name: Inu-Oh
description: He was born with a curse, but gradually gets rid of it. He's extremely good-natured and very positive about himself.

name: Ji-Hyeon Kim
description: __Height:__ 179 cm (5'10") Kim Jihyun, commonly known as V, is the current head of the RFA, however, he is often offline because of his trips as a photographer and his blindness. He was the fiance of Rika, and fell into a state of depression after her death, but did not show it. V is a person who respects one's privacy. name: Jinn
description: Jinn is a cyborg who was in the team "Rogue Out". His power, Wind Rage, is a type of Ether Gear that uses wind similarly to a typhoon. Jinn likes his sister Kleene and dislikes any man that approaches her. ~!After Rogue Out, he works under Drakken Joe with his sister, Kleene.!~

name: K
description: K is one the supporting characters in The Boxer. He is a legendary boxing trainer, having raised 5 boxing world champions. He is currently training Yu.

name: Kanaguri
description: Extremely powerful assassin, first introduced as a test administrator during the JCC Transfer Exam. He is also a renowned film director and the pioneer of "assassin movies." Due to his passion for filmmaking, Kanaguri always carries a film camera with him, has a film-reel shape shaved into the left side of his head, and wraps himself in a long scarf with the appearance of a film strip. He possesses a clapperboard sharp enough to decapitate someone and withstand a shot from an M60 light machine g

name: Kanta Oogaki
description: A preteen boy of the village, with perhaps budding interest in Satsuki. This character resembles Miyazaki in his fondness for cartoons and airplanes.

name: Kei Okazaki
description: A Special Police officer in charge of protecting Aiji Yanagi.

name: Kiga no Akuma
description: The Famine Devil is one of the four horseman devils. It is revealed in chapter 198 that: ~!The Fami shown thus far in the series is actually the [Death Devil](https://anilist.co/character/294475/Kiga-no-Akuma), who had been using Famine's name, for which she apologizes. The real Fami is an extreme crybaby. She states she feels bad for her classmates, and wishes to 'save' them. name: Kloe Rinz
description: __Affiliation__: Jenis Royal Academy, ~!Liberl Royal Family!~ __Nationality__: Liberlian Female student in the Royal Jenis Academy in the rural Ruan area. She is a calm and sensitive figure who looks after kids in foster homes. She has a pet white falcon named Sieg and is also the school's fencing champion.

name: Kotori Mizuki
description: Kotori is a very cheerful girl with the ability to manipulate computers. She is protective and fiercely loyal to Yuma, as she admires his unwavering will and determination of constantly challenging himself. Despite the fact that Kotori sometimes gets annoyed by Yuma's naivety and childish outbursts, she appears to harbor a deep crush on him. (Source: Yu-Gi-Oh Wikia)

name: Kousuke Iwana
description: A serious guy who got really into surfing in Shounan. He was a former baseball player, but an elbow injury ruined his hopes for the sport. When he discovered surfing and how deep it was, he fell in love with it. Now he aims to become a top surfer, and has never missed a day of practice. Ever since he came to know Yuuta, he has trusted him deeply. (Source: Anime News Network)

name: Latias
description: Latias is a Pokémon with a bird-like body stylized after a plane. Its long neck stretches forward from its squat body. It has no legs, usually floating instead. The rear half of its body is largely red and the upper half white, with jet-plane wings high on its rear and fins on the bottom near its tail. name: Lily
description: Lily is a female necromancer often associated with Cult and takes great dedication to putting others first and knowing what's right or wrong. (Source: Jibaku Shounen Hanako-Kun wiki)

name: Liskarm
description: __Place of Birth:__ Vouivre __Race:__ Vouivre __Height:__ 156 cm Liskarm is an employee of Blacksteel Worldwide, a private security contractor that provides security and protection services to international business, state agencies and non-governmental organizations. She has a lot of combat experience in conflict zones. Liskarm is currently under contract to provide professional security and other consulting services to Rhodes Island.

name: Macaro
description: Macalo grew up in a wealthy family, a result of one of her parents being a doctor. She doesn't feel guilty when killing animals as she hunts.

name: Mingfei Lu
description: __Level:__ S The only S-class student at Kassel College, he lived in his uncle's house when he was very young. It is said that his parents were far away on the other side of the ocean, engaged in important research, but he never met him. Lu Mingfei also had a vague impression of his parents. It was not until one day that he suddenly received an admission letter from Kassel College, and the ignorant boy was about to start his legendary life.

name: MISAKA 19090
description: Misaka 19090 is one of the original production of Misaka Sisters originally used for the level 6 project, which was to be killed in combat by Accelerator for him to achieve level 6. But the experiments were canceled when Accelerator was defeated by Touma.
